channel.title: Raphael Tannous
channel.description: Recent content in Codeberg on Raphael Tannous

item.title: Migrated to Codeberg
item.author: raphaeltannous@proton.me (Raphael Tannous)
item.description:
The main reason that I am leaving github is that I was not recieving emails correctly. I updated my email address, but I was still receiving emails at my old email address.

When I started migrating, I noticed that mpv-copyStuff had issues and pull requests that I did not know about. They were not in the main home page, nor in the notificaiton section.

Migrating was smooth. I just used the tool provided by codeberg. However, I had a little problem migrating my website1.
